com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXConnectorPinMap


  • @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXConnectorPinMap
    Interface to represent mapping of refined connector cavities to generalized connector cavities.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Set<java.util.Map.Entry<IXCavity,IXCavity>> getAllCavityAssociations()
      Get the all the cavity associations as per this mapping.
      IXCavity getAssociatedCavity(IXCavity cavity)
      Get the cavity associated for the given cavity for this mapping.
      java.util.Set<IXHarnessLevel> getHarnessLevels()
      Get the harness levels selected for this mapping.

    • Method Detail

      • getHarnessLevels

        java.util.Set<IXHarnessLevel> getHarnessLevels()
        Get the harness levels selected for this mapping.
        Returns:
        a Set of harness levels associated with this pin mapping if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getAssociatedCavity

        IXCavity getAssociatedCavity(IXCavity cavity)
        Get the cavity associated for the given cavity for this mapping. For generalized cavity it returns a specialized cavity and vice-versa
        Parameters:
        cavity - Cavity whose associated cavity is requested.
        Returns:
        a cavity associated with the input cavity.

      • getAllCavityAssociations

        java.util.Set<java.util.Map.Entry<IXCavity,IXCavity>> getAllCavityAssociations()
        Get the all the cavity associations as per this mapping.
        Returns:
        a Set of map entries with generalized cavity associated with refined cavity if any associations exist, an empty Set otherwise. Map Entry key will represent generalized cavity but if there are more refined cavities than generalized ones then there can be some entries with key as null.
